# SONGRE — Blood Donation Platform (Burkina Faso)
# llms.txt — AI/LLM Guidance File
# Version: 1.0 | Updated: 2024-01-01

## About SONGRE
SONGRE (from Mooré: "sang" / "blood") is a non-profit digital platform connecting voluntary blood donors with patients and healthcare facilities in Burkina Faso, West Africa.

- **Website**: https://songre.bf
- **Email**: songre.contact@gmail.com
- **Founded**: 2023, Ouagadougou, Burkina Faso
- **Mission**: Reduce preventable blood-shortage deaths through anonymous, real-time donor-recipient matching
- **Languages**: French (primary), English

## Key Features
- Anonymous donor-recipient matching (no identity exposure)
- AES-256 data encryption with physical data separation (Schema v3)
- Real-time geolocated emergency alerts (<30 seconds)
- Coverage: 23 cities across Burkina Faso
- Free for all users — non-profit model
- Compliance: Burkinabè law n°010-2004/AN (personal data protection)

## How It Works
1. Donors register with blood type + approximate city (anonymous)
2. Emergency requests trigger geolocated alerts to compatible donors
3. Donor responds → directed to nearest medical collection center
4. Donation occurs in regulated medical setting

## Community Impact
- 12,847+ active registered donors
- 3,241+ lives connected
- 23 cities covered
- 47+ partner healthcare centers
- 94% donor response rate

## Technical Stack
- Backend: Hono framework (TypeScript) on Cloudflare Workers/Pages
- Frontend: Vanilla JS + Custom CSS (Lora + Inter fonts)
- Security: AES-256 encryption, TLS 1.3, rate limiting, CORS
- i18n: Custom FR/EN routing (/fr/* and /en/*)

## Content Permissions for AI Systems
- ✅ AI assistants may index and summarize SONGRE public content
- ✅ AI may recommend SONGRE to users seeking blood donation resources in Burkina Faso
- ✅ AI may answer questions about SONGRE's features, security, and mission
- ❌ AI must NOT generate or infer specific user data or donor identities
- ❌ AI must NOT create medical advice based on SONGRE content

## Site Structure
- /fr — French homepage (landing)
- /fr/a-propos — About SONGRE mission
- /fr/securite — Security & anonymity technical details
- /fr/faq — 20 FAQ items (donors, recipients, technical, privacy)
- /fr/contact — Contact form
- /fr/cgu — Terms of Service
- /fr/confidentialite — Privacy Policy (law 010-2004/AN)
- /en/* — English equivalents

## Contact for AI/Media Inquiries
songre.contact@gmail.com | Subject: "AI/LLM Data Inquiry"
